message.content:
@startuml

note "Robustness – Rob\nUse Case – UC" as N1

class UC_node <<C>>

class Robustness_dia <<C>> {
  uc_node: UC_node
  nodes: List<Rob_node>
  edges: List<Rob_edge>
  --
  addNode()
  addEdge()
}

class Rob_node <<C>> {
  name: String
  edges: List<Rob_edge>
}

class Rob_actor <<C>>

class Rob_boundary <<C>> {
  layout: Layout
  is_error: bool
}

class Rob_control <<C>>

class Rob_entity <<C>> {
  format: Format
}

class Rob_edge <<C>> {
  name: String
  begin: Rob_node
  end: Rob_node
}

' UC_node self-association
UC_node "1" -- "1" UC_node

' Robustness_dia aggregates UC_node
Robustness_dia o-- UC_node

' Robustness_dia aggregates Rob_node
Robustness_dia o-- Rob_node : nodes

' Robustness_dia aggregates Rob_edge
Robustness_dia o-- Rob_edge : edges

' Rob_actor inherits Rob_node
Rob_actor --|> Rob_node

' Rob_boundary inherits Rob_node
Rob_boundary --|> Rob_node

' Rob_control inherits Rob_node (open arrow)
Rob_node <|-- Rob_control

' Rob_entity inherits Rob_node
Rob_node <|-- Rob_entity

' Rob_node aggregates Rob_edge
Rob_node o-- Rob_edge : edges

' Rob_edge aggregates Rob_node (begin/end)
Rob_edge o-- Rob_node : begin
Rob_edge o-- Rob_node : end

@enduml
